mapper.select: SELECT id, admission_no, patient_id, department_id, attending_doctor_id, bed_id, admitted_at, discharged_at, discharge_type, prepaid_balance, status FROM admissions WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admissions (admission_no, patient_id, department_id, attending_doctor_id, bed_id, admitted_at, prepaid_balance, status) VALUES (#{admissionNo}, #{patientId}, #{departmentId}, #{attendingDoctorId}, #{bedId}, NOW(), #{prepaidBalance}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE admissions SET patient_id = #{patientId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, attending_doctor_id = #{attendingDoctorId}, bed_id = #{bedId}, prepaid_balance = #{prepaidBalance}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admissions SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admissions SET prepaid_balance = #{balance} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admissions SET discharged_at = #{dischargedAt}, discharge_type = #{dischargeType}, prepaid_balance = #{prepaidBalance}, status = 'DISCHARGED' WHERE id = #{id}
